summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CaseDesk AI - Calendar, Tasks, and Documents functionality. All 17 backend tests passed. Fixed Document model mismatch bug (filename/size vs original_filename/file_size). Frontend verified working: Login, Calendar (events loading correctly), Tasks, Documents with preview modal.

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: Document model required 'filename' and 'size' fields but database stores 'original_filename' and 'file_size', causing 500 error on GET /api/documents/{id}
bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.fix: Made 'filename' and 'size' optional in DocumentBase model, added 'file_size' as optional field

context_for_next_testing_agent: All critical features tested and working: 1) Calendar loads events correctly (no 'Failed to load events' error), 2) Tasks page loads and displays tasks, 3) Documents page shows documents with preview modal working, 4) No 404 errors for /api/v1/* (old API), 5) Login with andi.trenter@gmail.com / admin123 works. Fixed Document model field mismatch bug.

login_with_test_credentials.response: Returns access_token and user with role=admin

calendar_events_api.response: Returns list of events (1 event: Testtermin)

calendar_frontend.evidence: Calendar page loads, shows 'April 2026', event 'Testtermin' visible on April 10

tasks_api.response: Returns list of tasks (1 task: Testaufgabe)

tasks_frontend.evidence: Tasks page shows 'Aufgaben', 1 task in 'ZU ERLEDIGEN' column

documents_api.response: Returns list of documents (1 document: Testbrief_20260407.docx)

documents_frontend.evidence: Documents page shows document card, clicking opens detail modal with OCR text
